purpose: First Indonesian monolingual baseline after human review of EN-ID prompt translations. This command may use the explicit OpenAI benchmark override in config/benchmark_model.json when local or Modal Qwen is unavailable, but it must not use the OpenAI smoke-only override.

preconditions.why: C1 ID prompts require human bilingual review before they are valid benchmark evidence.
Baseline episodes must call the local NegotiationArena checkout.

Baselines are benchmark evidence and must use local cached Qwen, local Qwen/vLLM, a wired Modal Qwen endpoint, or the explicit OpenAI benchmark override. OpenAI benchmark artifacts must be labeled as OpenAI evidence and not Qwen3-1.7B evidence.
